question.label: Visible leverage
question.name: Where do you think your leverage is most visible in the work today?
question.description: Looks for concrete examples of impact beyond steady delivery.

answer: I have made a few calls independently, but I still over-index on being safe.

assessment.note: He names cautious, safety-first decision-making despite some independent calls, which signals muted ownership and uncertainty about where to push.
